Flayed Skin Tunic  
 

Lore Item
Slot: CHEST
AC: 16
CHA: -2 HP: +20
SV FIRE: +5 SV DISEASE: +5 SV COLD: +5 SV MAGIC: +5 SV POISON: +5
WT: 3.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: SHD NEC
Race: HUM ERU
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Flayed Skin Tunic
Lore Item
Slot: CHEST
AC: 16
CHA: -2 HP: +20
SV FIRE: +5 SV DISEASE: +5 SV COLD: +5 SV MAGIC: +5 SV POISON: +5
WT: 3.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: SHD NEC
Race: HUM ERU
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Lore:Flayed Skin Tunic of the Lost
Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Leather
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):150, 25, 150
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:26 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:24
Lucy Entry By:Kheldar
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-17 10:41:37
Page Updated:Wed Feb 2nd, 2011

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: 40pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Uncommon
Level to Attain: 45
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Karnor's Castle
NPC Name
a drolvarg guardian
a drolvarg sentry
decayed soldier


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Karnor's Castle


Uploaded September 6th, 2024 by iventheassassin
Send a correction
Post Comment
Dropped in Warrens
QuoteReply
# Jul 16 2003 at 9:15 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758741976
View User Forum
30 posts
I got this and the leggins in the warrens off of the king and the high shaman. This was well after the patch that prevents npc from accepting things so I don't know if it was a fluke or if he drops them now too.
p.s. yes as a female erudite i do look like im wearing lingerie. Can anyone tell me were i can buy these in rl. lol.
▲ Page top
Flayed Skin
QuoteReply
# Jul 09 2002 at 1:26 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592246099656
View User Forum
48 posts
Is it me, or does this look like purple lingerie on Erudite ladies?
/giggles
▲ Page top
Left to rot? Not really....
QuoteReply
# Nov 05 2001 at 2:34 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250918598
View User Forum
Scholar
44 posts
Don't you all start rushing into that place for twink items. The Drolvags may not see invis but the undead will (and vice versa for ITU).

No, flayed skins aren't left to rot. I have spent levels 45 to 49 in KC (and to 51 at least). Hunted the place from top (hands and WL) to basement. These things are cash PP items. They sell for 10 to 15 plats per peice to merchants. 50+ plats for individual peices (up to 200+ plats for the tunic) from what I hear on Quellious. About the only times I see these things rot is when everyone has one (lore) and thats pretty rare (no one wants to /ooc rotting items in KC, the place is training hell).
▲ Page top
Nice stuff
QuoteReply
# Nov 02 2001 at 1:23 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
Same ac as banded, and a bunch of stats to boot. May not be good for the level it takes to get, but nice twinking armor. Slap a set of this stuff on a low level necro, and you'll have ac near that of a melee class. Plus most pieces have int, and strength, although the tunic doesn't.

As far as this stuff being left to rot, what level would you have to be to get into KC to loot some of this off the corpses? Do the mobs there see through invis, invis to undead, and the various camo spells? Please respond.
▲ Page top
RE: Nice stuff
QuoteReply
# Aug 24 2002 at 10:40 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1593965981189
Sage
183 posts
Good for newbie necros who want to melee along with their pet... nice AC and stat bonuses, and the price is right too -- about 10-15pp per piece in Bazaar if you are patient.

Too bad only the cap, boots and bracer have INT boosts though. As you get older (and, hopefully, richer), you will want to replace tunic and other items with gear that have more relevance to a necromancer's needs.

For shadowknights, this is will last a while longer -- weight is especially good for the weakling Erudites. Still, with 30-40pp, you would be better off with Netherbian Chitin instead of this tunic.
▲ Page top
RE: Nice stuff
QuoteReply
# Jan 15 2002 at 4:45 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592250928198
View User Forum
Sage
208 posts
Actually, AC is one better than banded. Also, a big plus for flayed skin is the weight. It's considerably lighter than banded. This makes it very good for Erudites, who will likely have encumbrance issues - especially necros, who aren't likely to waste any points on STR when creating their characters.

I would also expect that for necros, this may in fact be pretty good armor for levels able to hit Karnor's. AC 16 with save bonuses is nothing to sneeze at for the pure caster of even mid-levels, is it?

For the SK though, by 45 I'd expect they'd have something much better. 'Course, I stopped playing my SK in the low teens, so I defer to those who've actually played at those levels.
▲ Page top
RE: Nice stuff
QuoteReply
# Jan 15 2002 at 8:06 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757629829
14 posts
Well, to not be killed outright, I would guess you need to be around level 35. Things in here have a tendancy to aggro and hit hard.

Drolvarg Guards most places too, and undeads alot of places as well. So casting invis/invis to undead would only protect you against one of em...

That being said, if there is alot of ppl online in Karnors, monsters can truely be very far apart, and in those cases its sometimes very easy to get as far as the courtyards without meeting a single thing.

But since this stuff is not No Drop... like the Jarsarth Scale is, its probably alot easier to trade for than getting it self. Unless you are of a level high enough to group here.

Khazgadin Ironforge
Level 51 Cleric
Antonius Bayle
▲ Page top
Boy is this restrictive...
QuoteReply
# Aug 01 2001 at 1:25 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249444106
146 posts
Well, after hunting in KC for a little while, I've found flayed skin to be dropping all over. The stuff isn't that bad actually but the race/class restrictions are horrid. You'd think they would include Dark Elves at the very least and perhaps Iksar as they are of the right size. Ah well, the stuff just rots generally. It is underpowered for the level you get it at and is not exactly overly saleable.

cheers,
Celeris
▲ Page top
Drops...
QuoteReply
# Jul 31 2001 at 10:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591762157117
7 posts
In Karnor's, picked it up while in CY group...think it was one of the skeletal mobs, lookout perhaps.

I actualy bought this tunic for 50pp since there are so few Erudite Necro/SKs that want this on Tholuxe Paells

So Dark Elves can't use this? That bites.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 28 2001 at 3:39 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) WRONG SERVER !! and I really wanted that item too.. this is the Quellious area... NOT the dang Tunare.
#Anonymous, Posted: Jan 23 2001 at 3:34 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Any one interested in the FST its for sale on the Tunare Server Character Name Ravenmoor currently in Kethlin.
